SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-17-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-17-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENLEY, EDNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG INSTALLATION SERVICE ** THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE BY A PREPONDERENCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT SHOULD BE HELD LIABLE TO HER FOR THE DAMAGES CLAIMED IN THIS CASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
